COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-25-2008 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-07-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner Frank Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Linda Forster, CSR #7235.

Alan L. Brodkin, Esq. appeared for plaintiff United Shipping Solutions.
Jay Sherman, CEO for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
Mary Catherine Wiederhold, Esq. appeared for defendant Unparalleled Productions, Inc., a California corporation.
Maggie Gibbons, President of defendant Unparalleled Productions, Inc.
Notice of Time and Placed of Trial was filed on February 28, 2008.

The Settlement Agreement reached by the parties was read into the record by Ms. Wiederhold. In accordance with the terms of the agreement, defendant Unparalleled Productions, Inc., a California corporation shall pay plaintiff United Shipping Solutions $15,500.00 within fifteen (15) days of today's hearing. Each party shall bear their own attorneys' fees & costs. The Court shall retain jurisdiction over this matter in accordance with California Code of Civil Procedure Section 664.6. Counsel for defendant shall prepare a Notice of Settlement, and upon full payment of the $15,500.00 by defendant, both the complaint and cross-complaint shall be dismissed with prejudice.

Matter is continued to October 7, 2008 @ 10:00 a.m. in Department 212 on the CRC 3.1385 Dismissal Calendar.
